name: BotFucker Approved Action Bridge Dry Run

nodes.name: Read approved-actions.json
nodes.notes: Reads the approved-action export created by BotFucker review_cli. Dry-run bridge only.

nodes.name: Validate And Dedupe Approved Actions
nodes.notes: Validates botfucker.approved_actions.v1, filters already processed audit_id values, and keeps execution dry-run only.

nodes.name: Dry Run Provider Action Log
nodes.notes: Logs what the future provider bridge would attempt. It does not execute mailbox changes.

parameters.content:
Approved action bridge dry run:
- Reads approved-actions.json.
- Requires schema botfucker.approved_actions.v1.
- Dedupe key is audit_id.
- Logs would_execute only.
- No live provider action nodes are connected in this starter.
